personal.title: Automation & AI Systems Engineer
personal.subtitle: Python · Web & Cloud · Industrial Automation
bio: I build and explore intelligent automation and software systems — bridging the gap between physical hardware and digital infrastructure with equal curiosity for both worlds.
From backend automation tools, Telegram bots and Discord bots to working hands-on with industrial control panels and PLC-based systems — I thrive where software meets the real world.
Deeply curious about how systems work — from industrial control panels to cloud architectures — always focused on creating things that improve efficiency and functionality.

stats.label: Internships
stats.desc: Hands-on in Automation & Electronics at real production environments in Delhi.

stats.label: Technical Skills
stats.desc: From Python scripting and bot development to PLC systems and electrical troubleshooting.

stats.label: Field Experience
stats.desc: Spent solving real engineering problems in industrial environments across Delhi.

experience.title: Automation Intern
pts: Worked in an industrial environment with electrical control panels and PLC-based systems on live production floors.
Observed and documented system integration and testing workflows for complex automation setups.
Gained hands-on exposure to control logic fundamentals applied in real industrial processes.
Followed high-voltage safety protocols — developing awareness critical to industrial environments.

experience.title: Electronics Intern
pts: Industrial training focused on transformers and voltage stabilizers — from assembly to output testing.
Observed wiring, assembly, and component testing processes in a manufacturing environment.
Applied basic electrical troubleshooting techniques to identify and resolve faults.

items: Industrial Automation Internship (May–Jun 2025) at Losung Automation Pvt. Ltd.
Electrical Systems Internship completed in Class 11
PCM with Computer Science and Electronics Technology curriculum
Real-world internship exposure through both Class 11 & 12
